raw_consumer_statement:
I am filing a complaint regarding unresolved issues with my Citi Best Buy Credit Card related to a purchase I made on XX/XX/XXXX ( Order Number : XXXX ). 

Timeline of Events : 1. Missing Delivery : The order did not arrive despite a FedEx delivery notification. FedEx could not provide proof of delivery, so I contacted Best Buy customer service on XX/XX/XXXX and opened Case ID XXXX. 

2. Refund Approved but Not Processed : On XX/XX/XXXX, Best Buy confirmed my refund via email. My Best Buy account showed the refund credit was applied but listed as " pending. '' Assuming the issue was resolved, I stopped checking my account. 

XXXX. Promotional Purchase and Account Issues : This purchase was part of a promotional 6-month financing plan, as I was a My Best Buy Plus member. However, Citi Best Buy never applied the refund, and my account was marked delinquent. This caused : 4. Damage to my credit score due to missed payment reporting.

Accumulation of additional charges, raising my balance from {$520.00} to {$680.00}. 
Efforts to Resolve : I repeatedly contacted Best Buy customer service, who referred me to Citi Bank customer service. However, Citi Banks automated system would not allow me to speak to a representative without making a payment. Eventually, I bypassed the system and spoke to someone who opened Claim XXXX. 

XXXX. Current Status : As of XX/XX/XXXX, my account is still reported as delinquent, and I continue to receive automated calls from Citi Bank demanding payment. I have also attached a document from Citi Bank, received on XX/XX/XXXX, indicating that my dispute is still under review.
